## Describe your changes
Please include a clear, concise summary of the changes and the features or bugs they address.

## Type of change
Please delete options that are not relevant:
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the PEP 8 Python style guidelines or standard JS formatting.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented on my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have added automated regression tests in `tests/test_convert.py` for any backend modifications.
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass locally with `PYTHONPATH=. pytest tests/test_convert.py`.
- [ ] I verified there are no formatting check warnings via `git diff --check`.
